TraceA11y Responsibility Heatmap

Upload accessibility JSON files or use the bundled dist/data/attributed-report.json.

Data Source

Supported formats: attributed report JSON, raw JSON arrays, YAML issue lists, or labeled text issue blocks with fields such as URL, XPath, Snippet, and Rule ID.

Waiting for data source.

Errors by Role

Shared Ownership Load

Fractional counts based on per-issue owner probabilities. This surfaces co-ownership across teams.
